data.description:
The first time each target suffers damage before the start of your next turn, that damage becomes @DATA[key.typeLocal] @ICON[@DATA[key.type]].

This can trigger once for each target of the verse, separately.

Targets Receive: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.6Tx12tMHEznjUxaj], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.FZmT8QY31NromlLY], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.vUk23JgHiCXviwJ4], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.Rr2hGZ0KHmv1IZIe], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.MHvBgVg7egC3MO4W], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.JOVxvrw4AQUBo88G], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.8bKctJRT4X5Ai2ge], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.d2WBcxPOjEh1nJOX]
